Episodes.Title: Fatal Transmission
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Julia Nunes
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Stephen Bogaert, Joanne Boland
Episodes.Plot: A fiery collision between United Express 5925 and a small private plane leaves investigators stumped until they learn that a mysterious missing pilot may have played an unwitting role in the tragedy.

Episodes.Title: Terror in San Francisco
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Alix MacDonald
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Stephen Bogaert, Dale Yim
Episodes.Plot: Asiana flight no.214 crashes on approach to San Francisco.

Episodes.Title: High Rise Catastrophe
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Doug Crosbie
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Judah Katz, Alireza Shojaei
Episodes.Plot: Follow the investigation of the controversial crash of an El Al 747 into a high-rise Amsterdam apartment complex.

Episodes.Title: Fatal Delivery
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Julia Nunes
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Stephen Bogaert, Jonathan Purdon
Episodes.Plot: Fire breaks out on a 747 operated by UPS shortly after take-off from Dubai International.

Episodes.Title: Deadly Mission
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Alex Bystram
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Stephen Bogaert, Ryan Hollyman
Episodes.Plot: On 18 September 1961, a United Nations DC-6 crashes en route to Ndola Airport in Zambia. Then UN Secretary-General Dag Hammarskjöld is killed in the crash.

Episodes.Title: Edge of Disaster
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Phil Desjardins
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Stephen Bogaert, Dave Lapsley
Episodes.Plot: Flight 670 overruns the runway on landing at Stord Airport and careers down a steep embankment killing 4 passengers.

Episodes.Title: Deadly Delay
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Julia Nunes
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Stephen Bogaert, Jorge Molina
Episodes.Plot: Revisit the 2008 crash of a MD-82 aircraft as it happened, and the chain of events that led to the disaster.

Episodes.Title: Fatal Focus
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Greg Beer
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Stephen Bogaert, Ho Chow
Episodes.Plot: Investigate the crash of Garuda Flight 200, which hit the runway 100 mph too fast, claiming the lives of 21 people.

Episodes.Title: Steep Impact
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Andrew Kaufman
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Stephen Bogaert, Geoffrey Pounsett
Episodes.Plot: On 5 April 1991, Atlantic Southeast Flight 2311 crashes on approach to Glynco Jetport. All 23 people on board perish in the accident.

Episodes.Title: Carnage in Sao Paulo
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Julia Nunes
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Stephen Bogaert, Joseph Di Mambro
Episodes.Plot: On October 31, 1996, TAM Airlines Flight 402 crashed into a suburb in São Paulo, killing all 95 people on board and 4 on the ground. The cause of the crash was due to a failure with the Fokker 100's thrust reverser on its right en...
